title: <div>  •  Iago (Master Manipulator) → Gains the ability to sway votes but cannot
content:
• Iago (Master Manipulator) → Gains the ability to sway votes but cannot act directly.
• Frankenstein’s Monster (Exiled Creation) → Gains enhanced solo skills but loses faction benefits.

2️⃣ Mythic Ascension (Heroic Path) – Limited to One Player Per Role
• If a student chooses to become a mythic hero, they gain legendary buffs but must complete a difficult quest.
• Examples:
• Achilles (The Unbreakable Warrior) → Gains combat buffs but must pick a fatal weakness.
• Odysseus (The Cunning Survivor) → Gains rerolls on skill checks but loses loyalty to factions.
• Beowulf (The Monster Slayer) → Gains auto-success in combat but must always take on challenges.

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Encourages character progression beyond just XP.
✔ Gives students an opportunity to redefine their role in the class.
✔ Introduces iconic literary figures as playable transformations.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 483 (chunk 483/555)
